title: Masks of Nyarlathotep — Prologue: Peru
one_liner: 1921 年利马：Jackson Elias 以假名加入 Augustus Larkin 的安第斯探险——金字塔封印着蛆之父，kharisiri 正在苏醒。
source_pdf: Call of Cthulhu - Masks of Nyarlathotep (Larry DiTillio, Lynn Willis, Mike Mason etc.).pdf

source_pdf_pages.note: printed pages; Prologue Peru through Characters and Monsters

summary: Stand-alone prologue to Masks of Nyarlathotep (Chaosium 5th Edition product / played with CoC 7e). Investigators join Augustus Larkin's highland expedition in Lima, uncover the kharisiri death cult, consult Nayra near Puno, and confront the broken ward imprisoning the Father of Maggots beneath an Andean pyramid.
player_safe_summary: 1921 年 3 月，利马。记者兼探险家 Jesse Hughes（实为 Jackson Elias）邀你加入 Augustus Larkin 宣称的安第斯考古探险。晚宴在 Bar Cordano；之后可查档案、大学、街巷传闻，也可随队前往普诺与高原废墟。
keeper_secret_summary: Larkin 被 Nyarlathotep（Bloody Tongue 纹身）操控，目标是破坏囚禁 Father of Maggots 的金字塔金质封印。Luis de Mendoza 是 kharisiri 保镖。修复封印可令 kharisiri 消亡。
license: Chaosium Product Identity — compiled structured index for private play; do not redistribute prose
author: Larry DiTillio, Lynn Willis; revised Mike Mason, Lynne Hardy, Paul Fricker, Scott Dorward
